bead.title: artifacts: workflow-stage axis + paginated count wording + sessionStorage persistence
bead.description: Add Workflow Stage as a group-by axis (derived from generic <NN>-<slug> path regex; hidden when no artifacts have a matching path). Group counts under pagination show 'of N loaded' to be honest about page-locality. sessionStorage persists groupBy across navigations.
bead.acceptance: 1. Workflow Stage axis available when applicable; hidden otherwise. 2. Group counts label honestly: 'X of N loaded' under pagination. 3. sessionStorage round-trip works.
